name: smooth-scroll
description: Smooth scrolling for text editors via mouse and keyboard

scrollAllWithCtrl.title: Enable Ctrl multi-editor scroll
scrollAllWithCtrl.description: Use `Ctrl` to scroll all visible text editors

useAltMultiplier.title: Enable Alt wheel multiplier
useAltMultiplier.description: Use `Alt` to apply the alternative mouse wheel distance multiplier

horizontalWithShift.title: Enable Shift horizontal scroll
horizontalWithShift.description: Use `Shift` to change scroll to horizontal direction

wheelSmoothness.title: Mouse wheel smoothness
wheelSmoothness.description: Controls time-based easing for mouse wheel scroll. Lower is faster; higher is smoother.

wheelMultiplier.title: Mouse wheel distance multiplier
wheelMultiplier.description: Scales the scroll distance generated by mouse wheel events

altWheelMultiplier.title: Alt mouse wheel distance multiplier
altWheelMultiplier.description: Scales mouse wheel distance while `Alt` is held

commandSmoothness.title: Scroll command smoothness
commandSmoothness.description: Controls time-based easing for keyboard scroll commands. Lower is faster; higher is smoother.

commandDistance.title: Scroll command distance multiplier
commandDistance.description: Scales the distance of keyboard scroll commands relative to editor height
